lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਮਨੂਰ ਸਭਿ ਲਦੇ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: paap bikaar manoor sabh lade bahu bhaaree |
lines.english: Their sin and corruption are like rusty slag; they carry such a heavy load.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਗੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਡਰਾਵਣਾ ਕਿਉ ਤਰੀਐ ਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: maarag bikham ddaraavanaa kiau tareeai taaree |
lines.english: The path is treacherous and terrifying; how can they cross over to the other side?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਉਧਾਰੀ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak gur raakhe se ubare har naam udhaaree |27|
lines.english: O Nanak, those whom the Guru protects are saved. They are saved in the Name of the Lord. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: vin satigur seve sukh nahee mar jameh vaaro vaar |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, no one finds peace; mortals die and are reborn, over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਠਗਉਲੀ ਪਾਈਅਨੁ ਬਹੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: moh tthgaulee paaeean bahu doojai bhaae vikaar |
lines.english: They have been given the drug of emotional attachment; in love with duality, they are totally corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਉਬਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਕਰਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik gur parasaadee ubare tis jan kau kareh sabh namasakaar |
lines.english: Some are saved, by Guru's Grace. Everyone humbly bows before such humble beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak anadin naam dhiaae too antar jit paaveh mokh duaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Naam, deep within yourself, day and night. You shall find the Door of Salvation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਕਰਤਿਆ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਹਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa karatiaa janam geaa andar dukh sahaam |
lines.english: Engaged in worldly affairs, his life wastes away; deep within himself, he suffers in pain.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi visaariaa sach maranaa har naam |
lines.english: Emotionally attached to Maya, the mortal forgets truth, death and the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਨੑ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਰਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur sev sukh paaeaa jina poorab likhiaa karaam |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who have the karma of such pre-ordained destiny, serve the True Guru and find peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਪੜੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa parreeai har naam fir lekh na hoee |
lines.english: Read the account of the Name of the Lord, and you shall never again be called to account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਦੇ ਭੇਟ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਨਿਤ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jamakaal milai de bhett sevak nit hoee |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death will meet you, and be your constant servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਸਦ ਢੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: puchh na sakai koe har dar sad dtoee |
lines.english: No one will question you, and you will always be safe in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਨਹਦ ਧੁਨੀ ਦਰਿ ਵਜਦੇ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak anahad dhunee dar vajade miliaa har soee |28|
lines.english: O Nanak, the unstruck celestial melody vibrates at your door; come and merge with the Lord. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਪਤਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਲੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur te mehal paaeaa pat paragatt loee |
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, you shall find the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. You shall be famous throughout the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਕਹਿਆ ਜੇ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਖੀ ਹੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa kahiaa je kare sukhee hoo sukh saar |
lines.english: Whoever follows the Guru's Teachings, attains the most sublime peace of all peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਰਣੀ ਭਉ ਕਟੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਪਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kee karanee bhau katteeai naanak paaveh paar |1|
lines.english: Acting in accordance with the Guru, his fear is cut away; O Nanak, he is carried across. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ਨਾ ਥੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਮੈਲਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach puraanaa naa theeai naam na mailaa hoe |
lines.english: The True Lord does not grow old; His Naam is never dirtied.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੇ ਚਲੈ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਣੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhaanai je chalai bahurr na aavan hoe |
lines.english: Whoever walks in harmony with the Guru's Will, shall not be reborn again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਗਤ ਜਨੁ ਜਾਚੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mangat jan jaachai daan har dehu subhaae |
lines.english: I am a beggar; I ask this blessing of You: O Lord, please embellish me with Your Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਐ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਦੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam visaariai aavan jaanaa doe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who forget the Naam, come and go in reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਜੀਵਊ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੇਖੇ ਮਰਾਂ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khin pal gharree na jeevaoo bin dekhe maraan maae |
lines.english: I cannot live for a moment, for even an instant, without seeing Him, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਹੈ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har darasan kee piaas hai darasan tripataae |
lines.english: I am so thirsty for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan; His Darshan brings me satisfaction.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤਿਆ ਆਪਿ ਉਠਾਲਿ ਦੇਇ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: sutiaa aap utthaal dee naanak liv laae |29|
lines.english: He Himself wakes the sleepers, O Nanak, and lovingly attunes them to Himself. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਲਿ ਦਿਖਾਲਿਆ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur naal dikhaaliaa rav rahiaa sabh thaae |
lines.english: The Guru has shown me that the Lord is always with me; He is permeating and pervading all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਬੋਲਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੑੀ ਓਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bol na jaananaee onaa andar kaam krodh ahankaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not even know how to speak. They are filled with sexual desire, anger and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਓਥੈ ਹੋਹਿ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: daragah lekhaa mangeeai othai hohi koorriaar |
lines.english: In the Lord's Court, they are called to account, and they are judged to be false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਉ ਕੁਥਾਉ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਸਦਾ ਚਿਤਵਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: thaau kuthaau na jaananee sadaa chitaveh bikaar |
lines.english: They do not know the difference between good and bad; they constantly think of corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kis no aakheeai sabh varatai aap sachiaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, whom should we tell? The True Lord is permeating and pervading all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈਅਨੁ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape srisatt upaaeean aap kare beechaar |
lines.english: He Himself creates the Universe. He Himself contemplates it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak hau balihaaree tina kau jina har man vasiaa soe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those whose minds are filled with the Lord. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har guramukh tinaee araadhiaa jina karam paraapat hoe |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs worship and adore the Lord; they receive the good karma of their actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਜੀਵਣ ਕਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਗੜੑ ਮੰਡਪ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nit jeevan kau chit garra manddap savaariaa |
lines.english: They wish to live forever; they adorn and embellish their forts and mansions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਕਰੇ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਬਹੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aas kare sabh lok bahu jeevan jaaniaa |
lines.english: All people cherish hope, that they will live long lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਲਵੰਚ ਕਰਿ ਉਪਾਵ ਮਾਇਆ ਹਿਰਿ ਆਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: valavanch kar upaav maaeaa hir aaniaa |
lines.english: By various frauds and deceptions, they steal the wealth of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨਿਹਾਲੇ ਸਾਸ ਆਵ ਘਟੈ ਬੇਤਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jamakaal nihaale saas aav ghattai betaaliaa |
lines.english: But the Messenger of Death keeps his gaze on their breath, and the life of those goblins decreases day by day.
